archetype.rationale: Dinner-only service, harbor views, raw bar theater, and reviews center on the evening atmosphere and booking for sunset — the occasion is the product.

runner_up_rejected.name: MODERN PREMIUM
runner_up_rejected.reason: Experience and setting drive conversion more than menu efficiency; reservation is expected.

customer_type.value: Couples and visitors planning a dinner occasion

main_selling_point.value: Raw bar and grilled catch with a working harbor view at sunset
main_selling_point.evidence: Dana W. and Chris M. reviews

competitive_advantage.value: Menu changes with the morning catch, not a static seafood list

design_direction.tone: Immersive evening — let the harbor and the catch lead
design_direction.color: Deep harbor blue and weathered wood tones
design_direction.imagery_priority: Harbor view and raw bar over plated food alone
